targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(decision_latency_ms) AS "Decision"
FROM strategy_latency_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(submit_to_ack_ms) AS "Submit->Ack"
FROM strategy_latency_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(COALESCE(submit_to_fill_ms, submit_to_ack_ms)) AS "Submit->Fill"
FROM strategy_latency_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(p95_roundtrip_ms) AS "P95 RTT"
FROM strategy_latency_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(fee_bps) AS "Fee"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(spread_cost_bps) AS "Spread"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(slippage_bps) AS "Slippage"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(total_cost_bps) AS "Total Cost"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(impact_bps) AS "Impact"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(adverse_selection_bps) AS "Adverse Selection"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(funding_drift_bps) AS "Funding Drift"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(basis_drift_bps) AS "Basis Drift"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(fee_tier_adjustment_bps) AS "Fee Tier Adj"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(edge_after_cost_bps) AS "Edge After Cost"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(total_cost_bps) * -1 AS "-Total Cost"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  l.observed_at,
  l.strategy_name,
  l.exchange,
  l.symbol,
  c.side,
  c.fee_tier,
  ROUND(c.fee_tier_adjustment_bps::numeric, 2) AS fee_tier_adj_bps,
  ROUND(l.decision_latency_ms::numeric, 1) AS decision_ms,
  ROUND(l.submit_to_ack_ms::numeric, 1) AS ack_ms,
  ROUND(COALESCE(l.submit_to_fill_ms, l.submit_to_ack_ms)::numeric, 1) AS fill_ms,
  ROUND(c.impact_bps::numeric, 2) AS impact_bps,
  ROUND(c.adverse_selection_bps::numeric, 2) AS adverse_selection_bps,
  ROUND(c.funding_drift_bps::numeric, 2) AS funding_drift_bps,
  ROUND(c.basis_drift_bps::numeric, 2) AS basis_drift_bps,
  ROUND(c.total_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS total_cost_bps,
  ROUND(c.edge_after_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS edge_after_cost_bps,
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.estimated_fee_usd, 0)::numeric, 4) AS est_fee_usd,
  ROUND(COALESCE(c.estimated_cost_usd, 0)::numeric, 4) AS est_cost_usd,
  COALESCE(l.metadata ->> 'executionMode', 'unknown') AS execution_mode,
  l.metadata ->> 'status' AS status
FROM strategy_latency_metrics l
JOIN strategy_execution_costs c
  ON c.strategy_name = l.strategy_name
 AND c.exchange = l.exchange
 AND c.symbol = l.symbol
 AND c.observed_at = l.observed_at
WHERE l.strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
  AND c.strategy_name = '${execution_strategy}'
  AND $__timeFilter(l.observed_at)
ORDER BY l.observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100
